title: crataegus calpodendron
intro: Crataegus calpodendron, also known as the American hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Crataegus calpodendron include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, typically in combination with other herbs like hawthorn berries and rose petals.
